https://wdfw.wa.gov/places-to-go/shellfi.season: OPEN for harvest of clams, mussels, and oysters March 1 through April 30
https://wdfw.wa.gov/places-to-go/shellfi.rawText:
OPEN for harvest of clams, mussels, and oysters March 1 through April 30.
CLOSED for shellfish harvest May 1 through August 31.
REOPENS for harvest of clams, mussels, and oysters September 1 through October 31, 2025.
Harvest is prohibited from one hour after official sunset until one hour before official sunrise.
The official season is March 1 through April 30 and September 1 through October 30
